subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath come with mighty sovereignty! Through Him the back of disbelief hath been broken, and from Him hath welled forth the living waters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی اتی بسلطان عظیم و انکسر منه ظهر الکفر و انفجر منه ماء معین
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action
